case.title: CITY OF KANSAS CITY v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h: CITY OF KANSAS CITY v. UNITED STATES, 365 U.S. 568 (1961)
CITY OF KANSAS CITY, KANSAS, ET AL. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF KANSAS. No. 657. Decided March 20, 1961.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Cox and Roger P. Marquis for the United States et al.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
365 U.S. 568 MILLER v. CALIFORNIA. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, FOURTH APPELLATE DISTRICT. No. 719, Misc. Decided March 20, 1961.
Reported below: 185 Cal. App. 2d 59, 8 Cal. Rptr. 91.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
